title: Classifying Text as Spam or Legitimate
scenario: Develop a prompt that will classify an email as spam or legitimate using a pre-trained model. The input will be the email content. The output should include the classification result and a confidence score. The prompt must be under 50 words and use the classification model's API. The classification model should have a high accuracy rate for detecting phishing emails.
constraints: Must use pre-trained model for text classification

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the prompt adhere to the given constraints?
Is the classification model used accurate for detecting phishing emails?
Is the output in markdown format and within the 50-character limit for the species name?
Can the bot understand and execute the prompt without further explanation?
